Definition at line 38 of file MachineBasicBlock.cpp.

Function Documentation

◆ unbundleSingleMI()

void unbundleSingleMI ( MachineInstr * MI)
static

Prepare MI to be removed from its bundle. This fixes bundle flags on MI's neighboring instructions so the bundle won't be broken by removing MI.

Definition at line 933 of file MachineBasicBlock.cpp.

Referenced by llvm::MachineBasicBlock::erase(), and llvm::MachineBasicBlock::remove_instr().
